🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: 📝 Terror attacks every day 📝 In Moscow , another terror attack has been prevented. One and a half kilograms of explosives were placed in the trunk of an electric scooter, disguised as a household charging station. The scooter was positioned near a business center. SBU accomplices were preparing an explosion using the same tactics as in the assassination of CBRN Forces Commander Igor Kirillov . The target was supposed to be an unnamed high-ranking "law enforcement official." 🖍 According to media reports, although the terror attack was prevented, the perpetrators have not yet been detained. However, if you recall how much work the special services have had in recent months, this comes as no surprise. Reports of prevented attacks appear daily . 🚩 Moreover, a pattern of symbolism emerges: exactly nine years ago in St. Petersburg, a terrorist detonated himself in a subway car . Yesterday marked the third anniversary of Vladlen Tatarsky's assassination. Currently, representatives of so-called Ukraine hold undisputed first place in organizing terror attacks. ❗️ A massive recruitment base is an extremely acute problem, and it is clearly being recognized – one can judge this by the attention paid to the issue. The number of traitors/sympathizers/bio-drones keeps growing. Meanwhile, combating the perpetrators is merely treating the symptoms, not addressing the root causes. #Russia #terrorism #Ukraine ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Zen 💸 Support us Original msg

🚨 Villagers spot KC-130, Black Hawks over southwestern Iran desperately searching for downed F-35 pilot Iran’s NourNews published a photo and video of the US aircraft, flying somewhere over Iran’s Kohgiluyeh and Boyer-Ahmad province. 🛫 The image shows two Black Hawks tethered to a KC-130 Hercules refueler. The video shows the KC-130 flying solo low to the ground, firing flares and frightening a family of onlookers. Nour and Tasnim say the US operation was mounted to try to rescue an F-35 pilot downed by Iran, but that the mission failed. 👍 US-Israel-Iran war | @geopolitics_prime

🇺🇦 Ukraine is seeking U.S.-made THAAD anti-ballistic systems and other air defense assets currently deployed in Middle Eastern countries, according to Zelensky. He stated Ukraine wants access to long-range missile defense systems not available domestically or in Europe, arguing they would help counter Russian aerial bombs and push threats back by up to ~200 km. Given its scarcity, cost, and strict allocation, THAAD sits in the Ukrainian “dream big” category of air defense. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🚨 🇮🇳 🪖 Meet G.D. Bakshi, the Indian general who doesn’t mince words about US imperialism and Zionism Prime Minister Modi’s trip to Israel on the eve of the Iran war and Delhi’s refusal to condemn US-Israeli aggression has left a sour taste in the mouths of observers hoping for a unified BRICS response. It seems some in India’s elite have been lulled to sleep by their nation’s security partnership with Israel. Major General Gagan Deep Bakshi is not one of them. The former commander, decorated war hero and combat vet is an outspoken critic of US-Israeli adventurism against Iran. In a series of analyses and TV debates, Bakshi: 🔴 has pointed out that the current White House isn’t even trying to disguise its imperialism in flowery ‘democracy and human rights’ language. “Donald Trump is talking in Hitlerian terms” and Hegseth is behaving like a “Nazi lunatic” 🔴 consistently highlights the US-Israeli coalition’s war crimes, including attacks on schools packed with children 🔴 sees a ray of hope from inside the US itself because many Americans are waking up to the corrosive influence of the Zionist lobby 🔴 has praised Iran for its fierce resistance, which he says demonstrates that “not all third world nations are pansies” 🔴 slammed Trump and Netanyahu for their regime change fantasies, and stressed that Iranian society has only become more cohesive after enemy decapitation strikes 🔴 highlighted US combat losses, including the disappearance of the Ford supercarrier from the battlefield after a mysterious ‘laundry fire’ 🔴 calculated the missile mathematics that favor Iran, noting that for every missile or drone Iran launches, the US needs two countermeasures 🔴 emphasized that if the US is foolish enough to try a ground invasion, its forces will be absolutely slaughtered For Bakshi, the bottom line is simple. In Iran, Trump is not just acting “irrationally,” but displaying “uncalculated insanity!” 👍 US-Israel-Iran war | @geopolitics_prime
